cleanse_am.summary: Gentle, non-stripping cleansing twice daily reduces barrier disruption versus harsh soaps.

citations.title: Cleansing as the cornerstone of skin care: a review
citations.journal: Journal of the European Academy of Dermatology and Venereology

citations.title: Skin cleansing without or with compromise: soaps and syndets

spf_daily.summary: Daily broad-spectrum SPF 30+ reduces photoaging endpoints (wrinkles, pigmentation) over multi-year horizons.

citations.title: Sunscreen use and the development of new actinic keratoses: an RCT
Sunscreen and prevention of skin aging: a randomized trial

moisturize_am.summary: Daily moisturization reduces transepidermal water loss and supports barrier function.

cleanse_pm.summary: Daily evening cleansing reduces sebum, environmental particulates, and product residue, improving downstream actives' efficacy.

citations.title: Cleansing as the cornerstone of skin care: a review
citations.journal: Journal of the European Academy of Dermatology and Venereology

tretinoin_pm.summary: Topical retinoids show consistent improvements in fine lines, pigmentation, and texture in RCTs.

citations.title: Topical tretinoin for photoaged skin: a 24-week multicenter trial
Topical retinoids in the treatment of aging skin

azelaic_acid.summary: Azelaic acid 15-20% reduces erythema, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and inflammatory acne lesions in clinical trials.

citations.title: Azelaic acid 15% gel for the treatment of papulopustular rosacea
citations.journal: Journal of the American Academy of Dermatology

moisturize_pm.summary: Overnight emollient supports barrier recovery and improves retinoid tolerability.

citations.title: Effect of moisturizers on epidermal barrier function

beard_care.summary: Limited clinical evidence; user-reported reduction in beard itch and improved appearance with regular conditioning.

citations.title: Care of facial hair: a practical review

brow_shape.summary: Brow shape correlates with perceived facial harmony in observer studies.

citations.title: Eyebrow shape and perceived facial attractiveness: an empirical study

sleep_hygiene.summary: Sleep restriction associates with increased perceived skin fatigue and barrier impairment.

citations.title: Does poor sleep quality affect skin ageing?

water_daily.summary: Adequate hydration may support skin elasticity in interventional studies; effect size is small and individual.

citations.title: Dietary water affects human skin hydration and biomechanics

expression_release.summary: Conscious relaxation of facial muscle groups can reduce dynamic expression lines over time; observational evidence.

omega3_daily.summary: Omega-3 supplementation modestly reduces measured TEWL and erythema in trials at ~1g EPA+DHA daily.

citations.title: Omega-3 fatty acids and skin: from atopic dermatitis to skin cancer

micro_needling_monthly.summary: Microneedling shows moderate improvements in scarring and texture endpoints in RCTs.
